3137320.name: Big Adventure: Trip to Europe 8 - Collector's Edition
3137320.description:
AviGames presents the eighth game in the series of games "Big Adventure: Trip to Europe 8". It is a brand new hidden object game with an exciting new way of searching for objects and a lot of new interesting mini-games.

Go on a journey through 15 beautiful European countries with our game "Trip to Europe 8.” Visit interesting and amazing places of old Europe and Scandinavia, play exciting mini-games, collect souvenirs and find all the items.

This wonderful trip will take you through many tourist destinations in various countries. You will enjoy visiting famous tourist sites, exploring European musical culture, ancient castles and much more.

This hidden object game is full of new and popular tourist spots. Use your skills and knowledge to play mini-games and find all the hidden objects.

The collector's edition includes:
- 10 additional locations - find even more objects and a funny raccoon!
- 8 additional new mini-games + 12 more for puzzle lovers
- Beautiful desktop wallpapers
- Music player
- A collection of unique souvenirs
- 20 great souvenirs from the trip
3137320.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 俄语

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
